_comment: Registry of community plugins approved by the ChurchCRM maintainers. Only plugins listed here can be installed via the URL-based installer. Every entry must pin a download URL (HTTPS only) and a SHA-256 checksum of the exact zip bytes, and must declare a risk level and a one-line risk summary so end users see exactly what they are getting into before clicking Install. See .agents/skills/churchcrm/plugin-security-scan.md for the review checklist each entry must pass before being added.

_entrySchema.name: display name
_entrySchema.risk: low | medium | high — see plugin-security-scan.md for the rubric
_entrySchema.riskSummary: one sentence describing the worst capability the plugin exercises
_entrySchema.author: optional
_entrySchema.reviewedAt: optional ISO-8601 date the maintainers reviewed the zip
_entrySchema.notes: optional free-form notes shown to admins on the install screen

plugins.name: Hello World
plugins.riskSummary: Logs a greeting when a person record is created. No outbound calls, no database writes, no secrets stored.
plugins.author: ChurchCRM Community
plugins.notes: Reference implementation plugin. Safe to install on any ChurchCRM instance.

plugins.name: Meeting Outlines
plugins.riskSummary: Downloads Bible texts from api.getbible.net and writes them to local JSON files inside the plugin directory; also sends email notifications to meeting participants via CRM SMTP and performs CRUD on plugin-owned database tables.
plugins.author: Eoles Conseil
plugins.notes: Outbound HTTPS to api.getbible.net (Bible text downloads, admin-initiated) and cdn.jsdelivr.net (SortableJS CDN asset). All file writes confined to data/text/ inside the plugin directory. Two maintainer reviews required before production use (high-risk policy).
